Artiﬁcial Intelligence Interdisciplinary Institute at Maryland (AIM) https://ischool.umd.edu/centers-and-labs/aim/

INFO Faculty: Sheena Erete

The Artiﬁcial Intelligence Interdisciplinary Institute at Maryland (AIM) is a collaborative hub for AI, supporting faculty research, offering innovative and experiential learning opportunities, and focusing on responsible and ethical AI technology to advance the public good across industry, government and society. AIM brings together researchers from across disciplines and University of Maryland (UMD) units to conduct research that responsibly advances AI technology.
